interfaces.label: Provider connection status
interfaces.description: Returns provider availability without exposing provider secrets.

interfaces.label: GitHub connection status
interfaces.description: Returns scoped GitHub authorization state without exposing tokens.

interfaces.label: GitHub repository discovery
interfaces.description: Lists repositories authorized through a server-side GitHub App or OAuth scope. No GitHub token is exposed to the browser.

interfaces.label: Developer project creation
interfaces.description: Creates a profile-owned developer project and workspace record after authenticated developer authorization.

interfaces.label: Agent session creation
interfaces.description: Creates a server-side coding-agent session after authenticated developer authorization.

interfaces.label: Repository scan request
interfaces.description: Requests a read-only repository scan inside a scoped runtime environment.

interfaces.label: Patch proposal request
interfaces.description: Requests a reviewable patch proposal without applying it.

interfaces.label: Test request
interfaces.description: Runs approved test commands inside a sandbox only.

interfaces.label: Commit and pull request request
interfaces.description: Creates approved commits and pull requests with attribution after patch review.
